title: Chennai Port Authority Manager Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
shortInfo: Chennai Port Authority (ChPA) Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 24 May 2026 on the official website of Chennai Port Authority. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Chennai Port Authority Manager Recruitment 2026.

basic_details.job_title: Chennai Port Authority Manager Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Chennai Port Authority (ChPA) Manager Notification 2026 has been released on 24 May 2026 on the official website of Chennai Port Authority. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Chennai Port Authority Manager Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: First Class Graduate in B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology / specialization in the relevant IT field from a recognized university/institution. 5 years' experience in the Executive cadre in Programming / Electronic Data Processing / Network/System Design & Analysis / relevant fields of Information Technology in any industrial/commercial organization.

selection_process: Registration (1000-1100 hrs on walk-in day) Document Scrutiny and Shortlisting (by 1 PM) Interview (from 2 PM onwards)

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is MANAGER (IT). This is a contract-based position within the Chennai Port Authority.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the MANAGER (IT) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the MANAGER (IT) post in the Chennai Port Authority Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly on the specified date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the MANAGER (IT) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the MANAGER (IT) position will receive a salary of Rs. 120000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the MANAGER (IT) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a First Class Graduate degree in B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering / Information Technology or a related IT specialization from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q6. What is the experience required for the MANAGER (IT) role?
faq.answer: A minimum of 5 years of experience in the Executive cadre in areas like Programming, Electronic Data Processing, Network/System Design & Analysis, or other relevant IT fields is required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the maximum age limit for the MANAGER (IT) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the MANAGER (IT) post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC or SC/ST categories for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the MANAGER (IT) post is scheduled to be held on 05-06-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The exact venue details will be available in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the official website for precise location and reporting time.
